instructions: Season the chicken tenders all over with Jamaican jerk seasoning, ensuring they're well coated.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the seasoned chicken and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, flipping once, until cooked through and no longer pink in the center.
Add the thinly sliced red bell pepper to the pan during the last few minutes of cooking the chicken. Sauté until tender but still slightly crisp.
Remove from heat and serve the chicken and peppers together.
notes: For a more authentic flavor, marinate the chicken in the jerk seasoning for 1-2 hours before cooking.
Adjust the amount of jerk seasoning based on your spice preference.

description: Tender chicken seasoned with aromatic Jamaican jerk spices and sautéed with bell peppers for a Caribbean-inspired dish that's bursting with flavor.
title: Jamaican Jerk Chicken
